pricing_tier.quote_span: PRICING: $18,500 per month, billed quarterly in advance.
pricing_tier.annotation_note: Flat monthly pricing, not tiered by volume. present=false because there is no threshold structure, a single flat rate is a different data point (out of scope for this clause type) rather than a pricing_tier with one tier.

renewal_term.quote_span: This Order Form does not itself specify a renewal mechanism; renewal terms are governed by the underlying agreement referenced above.

msa_sow_linkage.quote_span: This Order Form is issued pursuant to the Master Subscription Agreement between the parties and is subject to its terms.
msa_sow_linkage.annotation_note: A linkage clause exists, but it names no date, title-and-date, or exhibit number for the governing agreement, only 'the Master Subscription Agreement between the parties.' reference_type=unspecified marks this as a weak/incomplete reference: the gap a real reviewer would flag, distinct from a clean date or exhibit citation.
